thecatsrufflebackpack-limitededition_890.name: Cat's Ruffle Backpack (Limited Edition)
thecatsrufflebackpack-limitededition_890.productInfo: If you are looking for a rare gem, look no further. The Cat’s Ruffle Backpack is so much more than a pretty bag, even though we must admit – and you will agree – that this pub-themed artwork and its colourful details are ravishing. Your belongings will be kept safe by the bag’s clasp and zip closing. It comes with base studs, so your bag stays stable and clean on any surface. It can be carried by the handle or, thanks to the detachable straps, as a backpack, over the shoulder or crossbody. Did we mention that it was a limited edition? If we were you, we wouldn’t think twice before treating ourselves to one!, Printed and embossed vegan leather, 3 ways to wear, Hand stitched details in vegan leather and cotton, 1 main compartment with zip closure, 1 inside zipped pocket, 2 inside open pockets, 1 external back zipped pocket, Detachable and adjustable shoulder straps, Comfortable handle

thecatsrufflebellabag-limitededition_890.productInfo: ‘’Sit down, stay a while’’ and admire the Cat’s Ruffle Bella Bag! This limited edition bag exceeds all expectations. It is ideal for everyday use, boasting a double compartment, fit to accommodate all of your essentials – and more. It comes with an adjustable strap to ensure your comfort, day and night, whether you carry the bag over the shoulder or crossbody. You will love this pub-themed artwork made of a blend of textured vegan leather, and the little secrets it holds. This bag will definitely draw the attention to you and people won’t help but stare, wondering where you got it from., Printed and embossed vegan leather, Hand stitched details in vegan leather and cotton, Adjustable shoulder strap, 2 compartments with zip closure, 1 inside zipped pocket, 2 inside open pockets, 1 external zipped pocket
thecatsrufflebellabag-limitededition_890.name: Cat's Ruffle Bella Bag (Limited Edition)

thecatsruffleboxbag-limitededition_89001.name: Cat's Ruffle Box Bag (Limited Edition)
thecatsruffleboxbag-limitededition_89001.productInfo: The Cat’s Ruffle Box Bag is a limited edition and we’re sure it’ll sell like hot cakes! It can fit in all you need daily or on a special outing, thanks to a spacious compartment protected by a clasp flap closing. It comes with a detachable strap - which is also adjustable - so you can carry the bag as a clutch bag, over the shoulder or crossbody. Inspired by countryside taverns, this vegan leather bag looks stunning, adorned with colourful details such as embroidered details, flowers, a pink door and a lovely white fence. This cosy atmosphere will make you want to find the nearest pub and have a cold pint in the beer garden - or will you order our newest favourite cocktail, the ‘’Vendula Sunrise’’?, Printed and embossed vegan leather, Hand stitched details in vegan leather and cotton, Antique gold closing clasp, Detachable and adjustable vegan leather shoulder strap, 1 main compartment, 1 external back zipped pocket, 1 inside zipped pocket, 1 inside open pocket

thecatsrufflecorabag-limitededition_8900.productInfo: Forget ‘’happy hour’’, you’re in for a happy summer with The Cat’s Ruffle Cora Bag! This vegan leather bag can fit in all of your essentials, thanks to its roomy main compartment and pockets. Not only can it be used as a backpack, but it can also be carried like a handbag, crossbody or worn over the shoulder thanks to the detachable straps it comes with. If this English countryside pub-themed artwork made of printed and embossed details hasn’t won you over yet, here’s another good reason to add it to your collection: it is a limited edition, which means that you will be one of the few ladies in the world to own this gorgeous bag. This calls for a toast, doesn’t it?!, Printed and embossed vegan leather, Hand stitched details in vegan leather and cotton, Comfortable handle, Detachable and adjustable vegan leather shoulder straps, 1 main compartment with zip closure, 1 inside zipped pocket, 1 inside open pocket, 1 external zipped pocket

thecatsruffledoublezippercoinpurse-limit.name: The Cat's Ruffle Double Zipper Coin Purse (Limited Edition)
thecatsruffledoublezippercoinpurse-limit.productInfo: Is it your turn to pay for the drinks? Quick, get the Cat’s Ruffle Double Zipper Coin Purse out of your bag! This purse is made of vegan leather and comes with two separate compartments, thus plenty of room for your cash, cards and receipts. Moreover, the zip closing will ensure that your money is safe wherever you go. How great does it look, sporting the same outstanding artwork as the Cat’s Ruffle bags – including the Tudor roses-shaped zip puller and ‘’limited edition’’ lining? Believe us, you wouldn’t want to miss out on this little gem, so hurry up and get yours while stock lasts!, Printed and embossed vegan leather, Hand stitched details in vegan leather and cotton, 2 compartments with zip closure, 3 card slots

thecatsrufflelunapouch-limitededition_89.productInfo: We cannot wait for you to discover the Cat’s Ruffle Luna Pouch! This limited edition bag can be used in so many ways that you won’t need any other bag this season. First of all, and as the name suggests, it can be used as a pouch, but it can also be used as a makeup bag. Clip on the strap and you will be able to carry it over the shoulder or crossbody. The Cat’s Ruffle tavern’s fluffy landlord and landlady will give you a special tour of the premises, starting with the welcoming fireplace and sofa, where you will be able to relax and read a book whilst sipping on a drink of your choice. What book, - and what drink - will you choose? In any case, we’re sure you’ll have a great time!, Printed and embossed vegan leather, Hand stitched details in vegan leather and cotton, Detachable and adjustable vegan leather shoulder strap, 1 main compartment with zip closure, 1 external back zipped pocket, 1 inside zipped pocket, 1 inside open pocket

thechristmastheatreboxbag--limitededitio.productInfo: Some dream of a white Christmas, but we are dreaming of another Christmas-themed bag… and here it is! The Christmas Theatre Box Bag is the perfect everyday bag thanks to its spacious compartment and pockets, but you can also keep it under wraps for a special occasion. This vegan leather bag can be carried over the shoulder, crossbody, or as a clutch bag by simply detaching the strap, which is adjustable for extra comfort. Are you ready for an evening at the theatre? Get your tickets and embark on an enchanting adventure! Let's see if you and your friends will recognise all these characters at the windows and behind the doors. Have a cracking time!, Printed and embossed vegan leather, Hand stitched details in vegan leather and cotton, Gold closing clasp, Detachable and adjustable vegan leather shoulder strap, 1 main compartment, 1 external back zipped pocket, 1 inside zipped pocket, 1 inside open pocket, Fully lined with exclusive cotton lining

thechristmastheatrecorabag--limitedediti.productInfo: Christmas came early this year! The Christmas Theatre Cora Bag is made of vegan leather and it will be your favourite bag for many reasons. With a roomy interior that can carry your essentials, it also comes with a secure zip closing to keep everything safe (don't you just love the snowflake zip pullers?). It can be used every day either as a handbag, a backpack or as a shoulder/crossbody bag, depending on your mood or the occasion. Indeed, this bag comes with two detachable straps. The artwork displays the facade of our new theatre showing ''The Nutcracker Ballet''. Speaking of which, have you noticed that a few of these doors open? thetempestgrabbag--limitededition_842121.productInfo: Whenever we think we’ve found THE bag, our designers come up with another stunner. The limited edition Shakespeare’s Theatre - The Tempest Grab Bag exceeds all our expectations with its one-of-a-kind artwork made of various textures and effects, as well as printed and embossed details inspired by the Tempest play. This vegan leather bag comes with a detachable handle and strap so you can use it as a handbag, crossbody or carry it over the shoulder. Your essentials will nicely fit in and the clasp closure will keep your belongings safe at all times. Use it every day or keep it for a night at the theatre: talk about a showstopper!, 23cm (H) x 26cm (W) x 10cm (D), Printed and embossed vegan leather, Hand stitched details in vegan leather and cotton, Brass closing clasp, Comfortable handle, Detachable and adjustable vegan leather shoulder strap, 1 main compartment, 1 inside zipped pocket, 2 inside open pockets, 1 external zipped pocket, Brass stud feet

thetempestlargeziparoundwallet--limitede.productInfo: Dear Vendulettes, let us introduce you to your new favourite wallet: the Shakespeare’s Theatre - The Tempest Large Ziparound Wallet! This vegan leather accessory is embellished with the same exceptional artwork as your Shakespeare’s Theatre - The Tempest bag and will astonish your entourage every single time. It comes with 8 cards slots, a dedicated zipped pocket for coins and has plenty of space for notes and receipts. Needless to say, this wallet will take our Vendulettes by storm so get yours before it’s too late: it is a limited edition so stock won’t last forever!, 10cm (H) x 19.5cm (W) x 2.5cm (D), Printed and embossed vegan leather, Hand stitched details in vegan leather and cotton, 1 inside zipped coin pocket, 8 card slots, 2 sections for notes

It has a spacious compartment that can fit your ‘’going out’’ essentials, and comes with a handle and detachable strap so you can carry it as a grab bag, over the shoulder or crossbody, depending on the occasion. This vegan leather boat-shaped bag will give everyone you meet the urge to read the play or go to the theatre in order to know more about the characters displayed on the bag and their fate. Also, it is a limited edition, which means that you may be one of the luckiest people in the world to own such a spectacular bag!, 12cm (H) x 26cm (W) x 11cm (D), Printed and embossed vegan leather, Hand stitched details in vegan leather and cotton, 1 main compartment with zip closure, Comfortable handle, Detachable and adjustable vegan leather shoulder strap, Brass stud feet

thevendulaemporiumbellabag--20thannivers.name: Vendula Emporium Bella Bag - (20th Anniversary Edition)
thevendulaemporiumbellabag--20thannivers.productInfo: We can’t quite believe we’re saying this but… 2023 marks the 20th Anniversary of Vendula London! Of course, we’re celebrating in true Vendula style with a brand-new range that celebrates our journey and impressive back catalogue of designs - The Vendula Emporium!, Crossbody bags have always been trendy, but The Vendula Emporium Bella Bag is a game changer. All of your essentials will fit in and be kept safe at all times thanks to the bag’s spacious double compartment and zip closing. The adjustable strap allows you to carry your Bella bag comfortably, over the shoulder or as a crossbody. And because a Vendula bag wouldn’t be a Vendula bag without some head-turning artwork, check out this shopfront fit for the occasion. It’s time to pop the cork and raise our glasses to Vendula London, our dear Vendulettes, and hope for many more years of making the vegan fashion world a brighter place!, *This bag comes wrapped in a Vendula Emporium Canvas Tote Bag instead of our classic pink dust bag, *Please note that this bag has a brushed effect on the gold hardware. This effect is deliberate and makes each bag unique., 22cm (H) x 29cm (W) x 4.5cm (D), Printed and embossed vegan leather, Hand stitched details in vegan leather and cotton, Adjustable shoulder strap, 2 compartments with zip closure, 1 inside zipped pocket, 2 inside open pockets, 1 external zipped pocket

thevendulaemporiumcanvastotebag--20thann.productInfo: Here’s a bag you’ll never go without! The Vendula Emporium Canvas Tote Bag is foldable and fits in any handbag. It is made of recycled canvas and comes with a 20th anniversary print at the front. This tote bag has a roomy compartment which allows it to be used to carry either your lunch box, library books or groceries, and it can even be used as a beach bag when the summer weather returns. Whether it is bought as a treat or as a gift, you can be sure that The Vendula Emporium Canvas Tote Bag will bring a big smile to its owner, no matter what age they are!, Digital print, Made from recycled canvas
thevendulaemporiumcanvastotebag--20thann.name: Vendula Emporium Canvas Tote Bag - (20th Anniversary Edition)

Of course, we’re celebrating in true Vendula style with a brand-new range that celebrates our journey and impressive back catalogue of designs - The Vendula Emporium!, Do you want to celebrate our 20th anniversary in style? Treat yourself to The Vendula Emporium Grace Bag! This vegan leather bag can be carried like a handbag or over the shoulder thanks to the handle and detachable strap. It comes with multiple pockets so your essentials will not only nicely fit in the main compartment, but also be kept organised (have you noticed the exclusive lining?). Moreover, it is adorned with the most festive artwork: party balloons, bunting and a colourful display of our most iconic bags. Which one do you recognise? Do you own any of these? If you don’t, start your collection today with this fantastic grace bag. Hip, hip hooray!, *Please note that this bag has a brushed effect on the gold hardware. thewitchespantrycauldronbag_903967542499.productInfo: Look what’s just appeared! The Witches Pantry Cauldron Bag is a novelty bag that will make heads turn without the use of magic. Ideal for everyday use, it boasts a spacious compartment that will fit in all of your essentials, and it comes with a detachable broomstick-shaped handle and strap, to carry the bag as you prefer. This vegan leather bag looks so real with watercolour effects, base studs to keep the cauldron stable, a green concoction pouring out of the lid, potion bottle-shaped zip pullers and a little frog waiting for the spell cast on it to be broken. Needless to say, this accessory will enchant you and your loved ones this season, even after Halloween!, Printed and embossed vegan leather, Hand stitched details, Comfortable handle, Detachable and adjustable vegan leather shoulder strap, 1 main compartment with zip closure, Fully lined with exclusive cotton lining

thewitchespantryclippercoinpurse_aw25.productInfo:
On a scale of 1 to 10, your excitement for the Witches Pantry Clipper Coin Purse is probably an 11! This dual-compartment coin purse keeps your cash and cards secure under a clasp closure.
Made from vegan leather and adorned with witchy art, it’s the perfect partner to your Witches Pantry bag. Just don’t be surprised if your envious friends start turning green… frog spell, anyone?

thewitchespantryclipperfrogbag_aw25.name: Witches Pantry Clipper Frog Bag
thewitchespantryclipperfrogbag_aw25.productInfo:
Ribbit, ribbit! The Witches Pantry Clipper Frog Bag is here, and it’s causing quite a stir. Ideal for everyday magic, this frog-shaped vegan leather bag features a clasp closure to keep your essentials safe.
Carry it by hand or with the detachable strap for shoulder or crossbody wear. Its cheeky grin and adorable design will steal the show. Looking for a reason to leap with joy? You’ve just found it!

thewitchespantryfrogclipperpurse_9039768.productInfo: Disclaimer: You may kiss the Witches Pantry Frog Clip Frame Coin Purse, but at your own risk! This funky vegan leather coin purse in the shape of a frog will amuse Vendulettes of all ages. Beyond its unique appearance, this accessory proves to be very useful, with plenty of space for cash and cards. It also comes with a wrist strap, so you can carry it safely. You will definitely be jumping around with excitement when you see this little cutie for the first time. What do you reckon: will it turn into a prince, or will it hop away with your money?, Printed and embossed vegan leather, Antique gold closing clasp, 1 main compartment, Fully lined with iconic Vendula London lining

thewitchespantrygrabbag_aw25.productInfo:
Grab your pitchforks—the witch hunt is back! The Witches Pantry Grab Bag introduces a new shape to the range, designed to carry all your daily essentials in spellbinding style. It features a detachable handle and strap, giving you the flexibility to wear it your way. Base studs keep it stable on any surface—but if it starts to levitate, you might want to run!
Shaped like a witch’s house, this vegan leather shopfront handbag boasts a magical design, with leafy roof windows, a charming pantry scene, and a mysterious door you may have opened once before. Dare to open it again?

thewitchespantrygracebag_9039424225511.productInfo: A drop of colour, two drops of style, Abracadabra! The Witches Pantry Grace Bag looks sensational in charcoal and green, and it is perfect for everyday use, as it can accommodate all of your spell-casting essentials. Worn over the shoulder or carried by the handle, it is beyond comfortable and it will add a touch of originality to your autumn/winter outfits. This fantasy-inspired artwork contains printed and 3D details that will enthral many, especially this staggering collection of books and herbs. Whether you’re an experienced witch or a beginner, you will love showing off your new Vendula bag this Halloween, and all year-round, for that matter!, Printed and embossed vegan leather, Hand stitched details in vegan leather and cotton, Antique gold closing clasp, Antique gold hardware, Comfortable handle, Detachable and adjustable vegan leather shoulder strap, 1 main compartment with zip closure, 1 inside zipped pocket, 2 inside open pockets, 1 external back zipped pocket, Fully lined with iconic Vendula London lining

thewitchespantryharrietbackpack_aw25.productInfo:
Cast a fashion spell with the Witches Pantry Harriet Backpack—a versatile new shape in the collection! With its roomy compartment and multiple pockets, it’s ideal for stashing everything from spellbooks to snacks.
It features two handles and detachable straps so you can carry it as a handbag, shoulder bag, or crossbody. Made from vegan leather, this spooky backpack is detailed with printed and appliqué artwork that will turn heads wherever you fly this autumn/winter

thewitchespantryhousebag_aw25.name: Witches Pantry House Bag
thewitchespantryhousebag_aw25.productInfo:
Bag or bewitched abode? The Witches Pantry House Bag is small but mighty, perfect for daily or special use. With a secure clasp closure, detachable strap, and green moulded boot bases for stability, it’s full of surprises.
Crafted from wood-textured vegan leather and adorned with chillingly detailed artwork, this piece will give you stylish goosebumps. Step inside—if you dare—but please, park your broom at the door.

thewitchespantrykeycharm_9039772942567.productInfo: The Witches Pantry Key Charm is the best talisman you could ever own. In the shape of a handbag, this vegan leather accessory comes with a ring and a clasp, and therefore it can be used either as a keyring or as a bag charm, depending on your mood. It sports a spell-binding artwork similar to your Witches Pantry bag and wallet, with printed and embossed details that will give you a sudden urge to replenish your herb jars and sage your home. Our little ‘’whisk-zard’’ and its pet spider will accompany and protect you everywhere you go this season. That’s a paw-mise!, Printed and embossed vegan leather, Branded dog-clip, Branded split ring

thewitchespantrykeycharm_aw25.name: Witches Pantry Key Charm
thewitchespantrykeycharm_aw25.productInfo:
A spooktacular finishing touch! The Witches Pantry Key Charm clips onto any bag or set of keys. Shaped like a mini handbag, it’s made from vegan leather and features spooky printed and appliqué artwork.
Bonus: it includes two mini charms—a cat’s head and a “Witches Pantry” cauldron—for that extra flair. Afraid of spiders? Give this one a name, and you might just become besties!

thewitchespantrylargeziparoundwallet_aw2.productInfo:
Forget black magic—you’ll fall for the Witches Pantry Large Ziparound Wallet instantly. Designed to fit in your handbag or backpack, it features several card slots, a zippered coin section, and slip pockets for receipts and notes.
Its secure ziparound closure keeps everything safe from goblins (or nosy familiars). Made from vegan leather, it’s decorated with a wooden witch house, potions, and our mischievous witch cat and spider. Trick or treat? We say treat!

vendulaarcadecatrisbag_9116072870192.productInfo: Are you up for a quick game of ‘’Catris’’? The Vendula Arcade Catris Bag looks amazing in the shape of a video game machine. It comes with an adjustable strap and can be worn either over the shoulder or crossbody. It can fit in all of your essentials and it can be used every day or on a special occasion to complement your party outfit. This vegan leather bag is adorned with the coolest details such as buttons, an iridescent screen, yellow and purple ‘’kitmonauts’’ on one side and on the other, ‘’catrominoes’’ that you will have to stack in order to get points. What will be your highest score? Grab the joystick and get playing!

vendulaarcadegrabbag_9100479988016.productInfo: If you can’t go to the seaside, let the seaside come to you! The Vendula Arcade Grab Bag can fit in all of your essentials and all will be kept safe thanks to the clasp closing on this gorgeous scalloped roof. It comes with a detachable handle and strap, so you can either use it as a handbag or wear it over the shoulder, or crossbody. It will give a futuristic touch to your outfits with its dark background and colourful artwork featuring details such as a multi-coloured staircase leading to a bowling alley, or a ‘’Catris’’ game machine. You will definitely stand out from the crowd this season, and we’re sure it won’t be long until you book a weekend away to the nearest seaside resort!
vendulaarcadegrabbag_9100479988016.name: Vendula Arcade Grab Bag

vendulaarcademinigrace_9100483559728.productInfo: ‘’Eat, Sleep, Arcade, Repeat’’! The Vendula Arcade Mini Grace Bag is a beautiful bag made of vegan leather. It is deceptively spacious, with two compartments and a few pockets to keep all of your belongings tidy. Carried like a handbag or worn over the shoulder, it will add a touch of elegance to any outfit, and you will certainly want to use it every single day. The arcade-themed artwork and colourful details will catch the eye and not a day will go by without anyone compliment you on this little masterpiece. It really is an out of this world accessory, isn’t it!? Wait until they see your matching wallet!

vendulaarcadepouchbag_9100485198128.productInfo: A seaside arcade with legendary games? It can’t get more 80s than that, can it? The Vendula Arcade Pouch Bag will bring back so many fond memories, with its futuristic artwork and flashy colours. Made of vegan leather, this bag can be used either as a pouch, crossbody or even as a makeup bag, thanks to the detachable strap, which can be slipped into one of the inside pockets when not in use. It is a brilliant everyday bag which will fit in everything you need on the go, even a zipper coin purse, but it can also be kept on a shelf until an occasion arises, so you can surprise your friends and family with your acute sense of style, once again!

This bag is spacious and can be used every day, by any Vendulette who likes to carry a lot, and it even comes with an extra pouch to store more essentials. It sports comfortable handles, but it also comes with a detachable strap, which allows you to carry the bag over the shoulder or crossbody, when you want to have your hands free. If you close your eyes and use your imagination, they will appear. Let’s try, shall we?

It features a clipped pocket at the front, where you can slide in your phone or any of your belongings. Turn it over and unzip it to reveal a wallet containing a zipped pocket for coins, card slots and space for notes and receipts. Could it get any better? Of course: this phone pouch is adorned with a fairy village-themed artwork made of printed and embossed details, and with such a stunner on your arm or in your hand, you will enchant everyone that crosses your path!

Step inside, and you’ll be greeted with gorgeous yellows, greens, and plenty of garden-themed detailing, including gnomes, birdhouses, plants and flowers. vendulatheweddingshopchampagnebag_910049.productInfo: Let’s pop THE question: will you be adding the Wedding Shop Champagne Bag to your collection? This delightful vegan leather bag is ideal for everyday use, but it will certainly make quite an impression on a special occasion. It can fit in all you need on a day or night out, and it comes with a pearl strap, which can be detached so you can use the bag as a clutch bag. In the shape of a sparkly champagne bottle and with its very own ‘’Champagne Vendula Coquelicot’’ tag, this bag will definitely steal the show and give you the most original yet elegant look, when paired with a special outfit. So, will it be a ‘’yes’’ or a ‘’no’’?

vendulatheweddingshopminigracebag_910049.productInfo: Here comes the Wedding Shop Mini Grace Bag! This small vegan leather bag is incredibly roomy, boasting two compartments and five pockets to fit in all of your essentials. It comes with a detachable and adjustable strap, and a spare pearl handle, which can be used on a special occasion, in place of the original vegan leather handle. It will stay stable and clean wherever you leave it thanks to the four base studs, so take this opportunity to show it off! You will overshadow the most stylish ladies in town with this wedding shop-themed artwork and the many details it is adorned with. Never mind the bride’s bouquet: your new handbag will bring you all the luck in the world!

vendulatheweddingshopsquarewallet_910049.productInfo: Nothing will set your pulse racing more than those three little words: ‘’New’’. ‘’Vendula’’. ‘’Wallet’’! The Wedding Shop Square Wallet is made of vegan leather and it sports the same artwork as the rest of the Wedding Shop range. It comes with six card slots, a press stud pocket for coins (and your sixpence), and room for notes and receipts, and all will be kept safe thanks to the wallet’s ziparound closing. Although it can fit in any bag, we believe that it will go perfectly with your Mini Grace bag. A match made in heaven!

vendulavivaitaliaamarettibiscuitboxbag_9.productInfo: Whether you have a sweet or a savoury tooth, we can all agree that the Viva Italia Amaretti Biscuit Box Bag is a must-have! This biscuit box-shaped bag is made of vegan leather and it is quite the treat with a cream body and red, white and blue details all over. It is suitable for everyday use or for a special occasion, and it is easy to carry thanks to the comfortable handle and detachable strap. It has plenty of space for your essentials, and everything will be kept safe thanks to the concealed clasp closing. Here’s an idea: why not match your bag with the Viva Italia Amaretti Biscuit Key Charm for a double dose of sweetness?
vendulavivaitaliaamarettibiscuitboxbag_9.name: Viva Italia Amaretti Biscuit Box Bag

vendulavivaitalialeaningtowerbag_9100500.name: Viva Italia Leaning Tower Bag
vendulavivaitalialeaningtowerbag_9100500.productInfo: Is the Viva Italia Leaning Tower Bag the most extraordinary piece we have launched so far? You can say that again! This vegan leather bag, in the shape of one of the most famous buildings in Italy, is a masterpiece. It is roomy, with space for all you need to carry along, and it comes with a strap that’ll comfortably sit on your shoulder. Whether you use it daily or on a special occasion, your outfits will be enhanced by the bag’s printed details and peculiar shape, and all eyes will be on you as you go about your day. Will you be posing for a few staged photos, like the tourists do in front of the Tower of Pisa? Go on, show us your best shots!

vendulavivaitalialimoncellobag_910050233.productInfo: Here’s a bag to use without moderation! The Viva Italia Limoncello Bag is the ultimate summer bag. It is made of vegan leather and it can fit all you need for the day, regardless of the occasion. This bag comes with a detachable and adjustable strap which allows you to use it either as a clutch, shoulder or crossbody bag. Little gift from us, the lemon-shaped coin purse will fit perfectly into your bag so you can carry your cash and cards in style. It’ll be hard going incognito with this novelty shape and its bright colours but, let’s be honest: why would you try to blend in when you could show off your new bag and make heads turn wherever you go?
vendulavivaitalialimoncellobag_910050233.name: Viva Italia Limoncello Bag

vendulavivaitaliapostcardzippercoinpurse.productInfo: Dall’Italia con Amore!’’ The Viva Italia Postcard Zipper Coin Purse will trigger you wanderlust with its double-sided artwork: on one side, a view of Portofino, and on the other side, a message signed by ourselves, just for you. It comes with plenty of space for your cash and cards, and the zip (and lemon-shaped zipped puller) will ensure the safety of your money at all times. This vegan leather purse will match the Viva Italia Postcard Pouch Bag to perfection, but it can fit in any other bag and it will undoubtedly be your favourite accessory this season. Now, shall we treat ourselves to a gelato?

vendulawoodlandrabbitskeycharm_910050564.productInfo: The Woodland Rabbits Key Charm is a little ray of sunshine! This small accessory in the shape of a rabbit is made of vegan leather, and it is adorned with printed and embossed details matching your Woodland Rabbits bag, purse and phone case. It comes with a clasp and a ring, and therefore can be used as either a bag charm or as a keyring. You will enjoy alternating the uses and even inventing your own style and combine it with other bags or keyrings – do you remember the Highland Fling range and its cheerful hare? The combinations are endless so, have fun!

vendulaxpinkribbonfoundation-londoncats&.productInfo: Another unique piece from our new range in partnership with the Pink Ribbon Foundation, the padded Vendula X Pink Ribbon Foundation - London Cats & Corgis Floral Camera Bag boasts a roomy compartment to fit in all of your essentials, and it contains two slots for easy access to your most-used cards. The wide adjustable strap ensures your upmost comfort and, little gift from us, this camera bag comes with a zipped coin purse which can be clipped onto the strap or slipped into your bag. This floral artwork, including the Pink Ribbon Foundation lining, will amaze you and your loved ones, and our favourite duo will accompany you in their pink taxi wherever you go this season!
vendulaxpinkribbonfoundation-londoncats&.name: Vendula X Pink Ribbon Foundation - London Cats & Corgis Floral Camera Bag
Vendula X Pink Ribbon Foundation - London Cats & Corgis Floral Folding Shopper & Purse
vendulaxpinkribbonfoundation-londoncats&.productInfo: We are chuffed to introduce you to the Vendula X Pink Ribbon Foundation - London Cats & Corgis Floral Folding Shopper & Purse! This flawless shopper bag sports the same Pink Ribbon Foundation lining as your London Cats & Corgis Floral bag. Part of our new range in partnership with the Pink Ribbon Foundation, it can accommodate your shopping, books and anything else you need to carry, and it can be folded and put back into this gorgeous vegan leather wallet. The latter comes with plenty of room for cash and cards, and it is adorned with printed and 3D details, as well as embroidery that will make everyone jealous when they see it. Isn’t it just wonderful?

Hop on the Vendula Bus, we’ve saved you the best seats! The Vendula X Pink Ribbon Foundation - London Cats & Corgis Floral Pink Bus Key Charm is part of our new range in partnership with the Pink Ribbon Foundation and it is a little cutie. Made of vegan leather, it looks fantastic in pink, featuring two black cats, applique flowers and a pink ribbon to remind of the cause this range was created for. It is equipped with a ring and a clasp, so you can use it either as a keyring or as a bag charm. Either way, it will steal the show and the mini Vendulettes will want their very own. Who could blame them?
vendulaxpinkribbonfoundation-londoncats&.name: Vendula X Pink Ribbon Foundation - London Cats & Corgis Floral Pink Bus Key Charm
Pink Ribbon Foundation - London Cats & Corgis Floral Pink Taxi
vendulaxpinkribbonfoundation-londoncats&.productInfo: Look who’s back in town! The Vendula X Pink Ribbon Foundation - London Cats & Corgis Floral Pink Taxi is part of our new range in partnership with the Pink Ribbon Foundation and we couldn’t be happier. This London cab-shaped bag made of vegan leather can fit in all you need daily. It comes with a comfortable handle and a detachable strap, and it will stay stable on any surface thanks to the wheels. This boutique handbag looks incredible in pink, adorned with applique flowers and embroidery, and starring our legendary cat and corgi. Let them accompany you wherever you go this autumn/winter by treating yourself to a new Vendula bag, and all for a good cause!

vendulaxpinkribbonfoundation-londoncats&.name: Vendula X Pink Ribbon Foundation - London Cats & Corgis Floral Pink Telephone Box
vendulaxpinkribbonfoundation-londoncats&.productInfo: The Vendula X Pink Ribbon Foundation - London Cats & Corgis Floral Pink Telephone Box will charm not only our Vendulettes but also everyone around them, whilst raising awareness for breast cancer. Second bag from our new range in partnership with the Pink Ribbon Foundation, this vegan leather bag can be used all year round, carried crossbody or over the shoulder. It has plenty of space for your essentials and it comes with a few slots for your most-used cards. This quirky vegan leather bag looks fabulous inside and out, with a floral theme and our joyous cat and corgis surrounded by Union Jack flags. Where else could you find a better bag? Take your time, we’ll hold the line…
